name: David's Cowboy Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, cream together butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into another bowl. Mix the dry ingredients thoroughly by hand.
5. Stir rolled oats and chocolate chips into the batter.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of batter onto lightly buttered baking sheets.
7. Bake in the middle of the oven until golden, about 10 minutes.
8. Remove from cookie sheet and cool.
This recipe makes about 64 cookies. I just had a couple out of the cookie jar; they're better the next day than fresh from the oven. These would be good to pack and mail.
